'''Shinra Shrine''' (新羅神社, Shinra Jinja, Shiragi Jinja)
== Shinra Jinja (しんらじんじゃ) == * {{ill|Chojayama Shinra Shrine|ja|長者山新羅神社}} - Located in [[Hachinohe]], [[Aomori Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Shinra Shrine (Minami-Echizen Town)|ja|新羅神社 (南越前町)}} - Located in [[Minami-Echizen]], [[Nanjo District, Fukui|Nanjo District]], [[Fukui Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Shinra Shrine (Nanbu Town, Yamanashi)|ja|新羅神社 (山梨県南部町)}} - Located in [[Nanbu, Yamanashi|Nanbu Town]], [[Minamikoma District, Yamanashi|Minamikoma District]], [[Yamanashi Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Shinra Shrine (Tajimi City)|ja|新羅神社 (多治見市)}} - Located in [[Tajimi]], [[Gifu Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Shinra Shrine (Hiroshima City)|ja|新羅神社 (広島市)}} - Located in [[Asaminami-ku, Hiroshima|Asaminami Ward]], [[Hiroshima City]], [[Hiroshima Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Shinra Shrine (Naruto City)|ja|新羅神社 (鳴門市)}} - Located in [[Naruto, Tokushima|Naruto City]], [[Tokushima Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Shinra Shrine (Kidetoku Town, Zentsuji)|ja|新羅神社 (善通寺市木徳町)}} - Located in [[Kidetoku Town]], [[Zentsuji]], [[Kagawa Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Shinra Shrine (Konzōji Town, Zentsuji)|ja|新羅神社 (善通寺市金蔵寺町)}} - Located in [[Konzōji Town]], [[Zentsuji]], [[Kagawa Prefecture]].
== Shiragi Jinja (しらぎじんじゃ) == * {{ill|Shinra Shrine (Tome City)|ja|新羅神社 (登米市)}} - Located in [[Tome, Miyagi|Tome City]], [[Miyagi Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Shinra Shrine (Himeji City)|ja|新羅神社 (姫路市)}} - Located in [[Himeji]], [[Hyōgo Prefecture]].
{{Disambiguation}} [[Category:Shrines with identical names]] [[Category:refresh]] [[ja:新羅神社]]

== Shinra Jinja (しんらじんじゃ) == * {{ill|Chojayama Shinra Shrine|ja|長者山新羅神社}} - Located in [[Hachinohe]], [[Aomori Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Shinra Shrine (Minami-Echizen Town)|ja|新羅神社 (南越前町)}} - Located in [[Minami-Echizen]], [[Nanjo District, Fukui|Nanjo District]], [[Fukui Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Shinra Shrine (Nanbu Town, Yamanashi)|ja|新羅神社 (山梨県南部町)}} - Located in [[Nanbu, Yamanashi|Nanbu Town]], [[Minamikoma District, Yamanashi|Minamikoma District]], [[Yamanashi Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Shinra Shrine (Tajimi City)|ja|新羅神社 (多治見市)}} - Located in [[Tajimi]], [[Gifu Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Shinra Shrine (Hiroshima City)|ja|新羅神社 (広島市)}} - Located in [[Asaminami-ku, Hiroshima|Asaminami Ward]], [[Hiroshima City]], [[Hiroshima Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Shinra Shrine (Naruto City)|ja|新羅神社 (鳴門市)}} - Located in [[Naruto, Tokushima|Naruto City]], [[Tokushima Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Shinra Shrine (Kidetoku Town, Zentsuji)|ja|新羅神社 (善通寺市木徳町)}} - Located in [[Kidetoku Town]], [[Zentsuji]], [[Kagawa Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Shinra Shrine (Konzōji Town, Zentsuji)|ja|新羅神社 (善通寺市金蔵寺町)}} - Located in [[Konzōji Town]], [[Zentsuji]], [[Kagawa Prefecture]].
== Shiragi Jinja (しらぎじんじゃ) == * {{ill|Shinra Shrine (Tome City)|ja|新羅神社 (登米市)}} - Located in [[Tome, Miyagi|Tome City]], [[Miyagi Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Shinra Shrine (Himeji City)|ja|新羅神社 (姫路市)}} - Located in [[Himeji]], [[Hyōgo Prefecture]].

== Shinra Jinja (しんらじんじゃ) == * {{ill|Chojayama Shinra Shrine|ja|長者山新羅神社}} - Located in [[Hachinohe]], [[Aomori Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Shinra Shrine (Minami-Echizen Town)|ja|新羅神社 (南越前町)}} - Located in [[Minami-Echizen]], [[Nanjo District, Fukui|Nanjo District]], [[Fukui Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Shinra Shrine (Nanbu Town, Yamanashi)|ja|新羅神社 (山梨県南部町)}} - Located in [[Nanbu, Yamanashi|Nanbu Town]], [[Minamikoma District, Yamanashi|Minamikoma District]], [[Yamanashi Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Shinra Shrine (Tajimi City)|ja|新羅神社 (多治見市)}} - Located in [[Tajimi]], [[Gifu Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Shinra Shrine (Hiroshima City)|ja|新羅神社 (広島市)}} - Located in [[Asaminami-ku, Hiroshima|Asaminami Ward]], [[Hiroshima City]], [[Hiroshima Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Shinra Shrine (Naruto City)|ja|新羅神社 (鳴門市)}} - Located in [[Naruto, Tokushima|Naruto City]], [[Tokushima Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Shinra Shrine (Kidetoku Town, Zentsuji)|ja|新羅神社 (善通寺市木徳町)}} - Located in [[Kidetoku Town]], [[Zentsuji]], [[Kagawa Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Shinra Shrine (Konzōji Town, Zentsuji)|ja|新羅神社 (善通寺市金蔵寺町)}} - Located in [[Konzōji Town]], [[Zentsuji]], [[Kagawa Prefecture]].
== Shiragi Jinja (しらぎじんじゃ) == * {{ill|Shinra Shrine (Tome City)|ja|新羅神社 (登米市)}} - Located in [[Tome, Miyagi|Tome City]], [[Miyagi Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Shinra Shrine (Himeji City)|ja|新羅神社 (姫路市)}} - Located in [[Himeji]], [[Hyōgo Prefecture]].

revision.text:
'''新羅神社'''（しんらじんじゃ、しらぎじんじゃ）
== しんらじんじゃ == * [[長者山新羅神社]] - [[青森県]][[八戸市]] * [[新羅神社 (南越前町)]] - [[福井県]][[南条郡]][[南越前町]] * [[新羅神社 (山梨県南部町)]] - [[山梨県]][[南巨摩郡]][[南部町 (山梨県)|南部町]] * [[新羅神社 (多治見市)]] - [[岐阜県]][[多治見市]] * [[新羅神社 (広島市)]] - [[広島県]][[広島市]][[安佐南区]] * [[新羅神社 (鳴門市)]] - [[徳島県]][[鳴門市]] * [[新羅神社 (善通寺市木徳町)]] - [[香川県]][[善通寺市]][[木徳町]] * [[新羅神社 (善通寺市金蔵寺町)]] - 香川県善通寺市[[金蔵寺町]]
== しらぎじんじゃ == * [[新羅神社 (登米市)]] - [[宮城県]][[登米市]] * [[新羅神社 (姫路市)]] - [[兵庫県]][[姫路市]]
{{曖昧さ回避}} {{デフォルトソート:しんらしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]
